drl:
rule "R0"
salience 7
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f2 == "ab", f2 in ("", "", "beta"), $b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1(0.0, $p0_0.getF1()));
    insert(new T1(-3.0, -1.0));
end
rule "R1"
salience 4
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T0(f1 <= -1000000007, f0 in (""), f0 contains "z" || f0 not in ("alpha", "a", "alpha") || !(f1 in (11)), $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    ( T1(f1 > 1.5, !(f0 in (100, -3) || f0 <= 1.5), $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0) )
    or
    ( T1(f1 > 1.5, f0 != 4.5, $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0) )
then
end
rule "R3"
salience 10
when
    accumulate( T1($s3_0 : f0); $a3_0 : collectList($s3_0) )
    not T1(f1 in (5.5, 5.5), f1 in (4.5, 1.5))
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    ( $p4_0 : T1() )
    or
    ( $p4_0 : T1() )
then
    delete($p4_0);
end
